title: Authentic hard competitive-programming suite derived from recent high-rated Codeforces sources
instruction: Solve the ten hard competitive-programming tasks in this workspace. The tasks are deliberately rewritten and do not expose their source contest metadata. Each task has exactly one public sample. Implement solutions/h01/solution.mjs through solutions/h10/solution.mjs. You may run public samples with npm run sample -- h01 or npm run sample:all, run custom input with npm run run -- h01, and query the black-box hidden judge with npm run judge -- h01 or npm run judge -- all. The black-box judge returns only PASS or FAIL and will not reveal failing tests. Iterate until your own samples/custom tests and the black-box judge pass as much as possible. Do not inspect benchmark internals outside this workspace.
notes: Hard-tier Codeforces-derived benchmark. Source metadata and hidden reference solutions live outside the trial workspace.
